name: Drift Legends
title: Drift Legends | Free 3D Racing Game with Story Mode & Multiplayer | Weekly Arcade
description: Play Drift Legends free online. Race through 5 stunning 3D worlds, master drift mechanics, defeat rival racers in story mode, and challenge friends in real-time multiplayer. No download required.
keywords: drift legends, kart racing game, 3D racing browser game, multiplayer racing, story mode racing, drift game online, kart game browser, free racing game, browser racing 3D, weekly arcade
tips: Brake before corners, not during — entering a turn at the right speed is key to maintaining a good drift
Tap the drift button just before turning to initiate a controlled slide for bonus drift points
Upgrade your car's handling stat first — it makes every track easier
Learn the racing line for each track — outer-inner-outer approach works on most corners
In multiplayer, draft behind opponents on straights for a speed boost before overtaking on corners
howToPlay: Steer with arrow keys, WASD, or tilt controls on mobile. Use the brake to slow before turns and the drift button to slide through corners. Complete story mode chapters to unlock new tracks and cars. Challenge other players in real-time multiplayer races.
